summary: The mobile-responsive Creative Spark layout fully meets all requirements. Gallery uses 1-2 columns on mobile via getColumnCount() (1 col <480px, 2 cols 480-768px). Conversation panel is a full-screen overlay sliding up from bottom with spring animation, not a side panel. All interactive targets (download buttons, conversation toggle, close button) meet the 44x44px minimum via min-h-11/min-w-11 classes. Controls respect safe-area-inset-bottom using max(0.75rem, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)). Scroll containment is applied via overscrollBehavior: contain on the MasonryGallery container. The overlay also respects safe-area-inset-top. Code is clean, follows project conventions (nullish coalescing, no eslint-disable, framer-motion AnimatePresence), and lint/build pass.

codeReview.summary: Clean implementation across 2 files (CreativeSparkMobileLayout.tsx and MasonryGallery.tsx). All four expected behaviors are covered: responsive columns, full-screen conversation overlay, 44px touch targets, and safe-area-inset-bottom. The worker followed existing patterns (framer-motion for animation, Tailwind responsive prefixes, shadcn Badge component). No bugs or missing edge cases found.

issues.description: VideoTile overlay className ternary is redundant — both branches of `isPlaying ? '...' : '...'` produce identical class strings (both have `group-hover:opacity-100 group-active:opacity-100`). This was pre-existing but the worker added group-active to both branches identically. Consider simplifying to remove the ternary.

Download All button uses `min-h-11 sm:min-h-0` — sm:min-h-0 sets min-height to 0px on ≥640px viewports. This works correctly but min-h-0 is unusual; the button's natural height takes over anyway. Not a bug, just slightly unconventional.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mobile layout uses env(safe-area-inset-*) via both Tailwind arbitrary values and inline styles. The mission AGENTS.md doesn't document which approach is preferred (Tailwind pb-[max(...,env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] vs inline style={{paddingBottom: 'env(safe-area-inset-bottom)'}})). Both are used in this file — Tailwind for the controls bar, inline styles for the overlay container. Documenting the preferred pattern would help consistency.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: CreativeSparkMobileLayout.tsx line 112 uses Tailwind: pb-[max(0.75rem,env(safe-area-inset-bottom))]. Line 137-138 uses inline styles: style={{paddingTop: 'env(safe-area-inset-top)', paddingBottom: 'env(safe-area-inset-bottom)'}}.

issues.description: VideoTile overlay className ternary is redundant — both branches produce identical class strings after the group-active addition.
Download All button uses min-h-11 sm:min-h-0 — sm:min-h-0 sets min-height to 0px which is unusual but functionally correct.
